main.description: Subscribes the reader to a labeler service (like adding a Bluesky moderation service). Presence of the record means subscribed; deleting it unsubscribes. The rkey is derived from the labeler DID so each labeler maps to a single record.

labeler.description: DID of the labeler service being subscribed to.

labels.description: Per-label visibility overrides for this labeler's label values.

createdAt.description: When the reader subscribed to the labeler.

labelPref.description: How the reader wants a single label value from this labeler treated.

val.description: The label value this preference applies to.

visibility.description: ignore = show normally; warn = content warning / blur; hide = filter out.
